issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases.
The skill is limited to Ubuntu/Debian VPS environments and may not work on other platforms.
Installation scripts and plugins are downloaded without checksum verification.

scenarios.name: deploy-node-app-with-domain-ssl
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully meets the rubric, while Response A omits the required dokku domains:add and dokku letsencrypt:enable commands.

scenarios.name: setup-postgres-redis-env-vars
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully meets the rubric, while Response B omits the required DATABASE_URL name and thus falls short.
